---
title: PalaeOpen Training School
subtitle: Setup
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [simple, styles.scss]
    embed-resources: true
html-math-method:
  method: mathjax
  url: "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mathjax@3/es5/tex-mml-chtml.js"
author:
  - name: Gavin Simpson
    orcid: 0000-0002-9084-8413
    email: gavin@anivet.au.dk
    affiliations: Aarhus University
date: last-modified
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-color: "#003d73"
presenter:
  name: Gavin Simpson
  institute: Department of Animal & Veterinary Sciences
knitr:
  opts_chunk: 
    echo: false
    message: false
    fig.align: center
    fig.height: 6
    fig.width: 10.66666
    collapse: true
highlight-style: github-dark
---

## Create a folder

Using your file manager

* create a folder to store the teaching materials

* ideally create it somewhere familiar

* ideally no spaces in the folder name or path to it

This folder will be added to each day

## Install *usethis* 📦

```{r}
#| eval: false
install.packages("usethis")
```

## Open RStudio

* Start RStudio

* Go to Session menu

* Select **Select working directory** > **Choose Directory...**
